name: Arizer Herb Jar
summary: Arizer Herb Jar — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Designed by Arizer, this premium storage jar is made from durable borosilicate glass with an airtight lid to protect contents from moisture and air exposure. Its compact size makes it perfect for everyday storage, travel, or as an add-on item alongside Arizer vaporisers. Official Arizer accessory – information provided directly by the manufacturer. For legal herbal use only. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
